ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "gross" INTEGER /* Gross revenue from the film */,
  "gross_adjusted" INTEGER /* Adjusted gross revenue to account for inflation */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rating of the film */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the film in dollars */,
  "domestic_gross" INTEGER /* Domestic gross revenue in dollars */,
  "international_gross" INTEGER /* International gross revenue in dollars */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* Production companies involved in the film */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the film was produced */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the studio's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the studio */,
  "website" TEXT /* Studio website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, executive, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the revenue source (e.g., Box Office, Streaming) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revenue source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue source */,
  "revenue_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of revenue in dollars */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the revenue was recorded */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the revenue was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_revenues_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_revenues_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES revenue_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "budget_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of budget in dollars */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the budget was set */,
  "production_cost" INTEGER /* Production cost in dollars */,
  "marketing_cost" INTEGER /* Marketing cost in dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_budgets_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, IMDb) */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., 8.5/10) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_and_crew" (
  "cast_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast and crew entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast or crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast or crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the cast or crew member belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_and_crew_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Whether the film won the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
